# Paper & Pencil

> London interior architecture studio designing considered spaces for hospitality, residence and retail.

Paper & Pencil is a small studio taking on a handful of commissions each year. Drawings are made by hand from a quiet room in London.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio introduction, selected work, services, and contact.
- [Institutional Work](/work/institutional): Projects for cultural and civic institutions.
- [Industrial Work](/work/industrial): Adaptive reuse and workshop interiors.
- [Commercial Work](/work/commercial): Hospitality and retail interiors.
- [Residential Work](/work/residential): Private homes and apartments.
